Title: Product details page renders name and price
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/product-details?id=1; 2. Wait for networkidle; 3. Verify heading is visible; 4. Verify price text with $ is visible
Expected_Result: Product name heading and price with $ symbol are visible

Title: @smoke Product details page loads with name and price
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/product-details?id=1; 2. Wait for page load; 3. Verify heading and price visible
Expected_Result: Product details page displays heading and price correctly

Title: Back button navigates away from PDP
Preconditions: User is on product details page
Expected_Result: User navigates away from /product-details URL to previous or home page

Title: Product image renders with alt text
Preconditions: User is on product details page
Steps: 1. Locate product image; 2. Verify image is visible; 3. Check alt attribute has content
Expected_Result: Product image displays and has meaningful alt text

Title: Product details page renders name and price
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/product-details?id=1; 2. Verify heading and price are visible
Expected_Result: Product name and price are displayed correctly

Title: Quantity control plus/minus behavior
Preconditions: User is on product details page
Steps: 1. Locate plus (+) button; 2. Locate minus (−) button; 3. Click plus button twice; 4. Click minus button once
Expected_Result: Quantity increases with plus button and decreases with minus button without breaking UI

Title: Quantity control plus/minus behavior
Preconditions: User is on product details page
Steps: 1. Click + button multiple times; 2. Verify quantity increments
Expected_Result: Plus button increments quantity with each click

Title: Quantity control plus/minus behavior
Preconditions: User is on product details page
Steps: 1. Click − button to decrease quantity; 2. Verify quantity decrements
Expected_Result: Minus button decrements quantity with each click

Title: Favourite toggle on product details is clickable
Preconditions: User is on product details page
Steps: 1. Locate favourite button with SVG icon; 2. Click favourite button; 3. Click again to toggle
Expected_Result: Favourite button is clickable and toggles state on each click

Title: Add to cart from PDP
Preconditions: User is logged in on product details page
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/product-details?id=1; 2. Click 'Add to Cart' button; 3. Verify cart badge appears
Expected_Result: Product is added to cart and cart badge becomes visible

Title: @smoke Add to cart from PDP updates badge
Preconditions: User is logged in on product details page
Steps: 1. Navigate to product details; 2. Click Add to Cart; 3. Verify badge visible
Expected_Result: Add to Cart button works and cart badge updates showing item added

Title: Invalid product id shows guard behavior
Expected_Result: Page displays 'not found' or error message; user is guarded from invalid state

Title: Direct access without authenticated state is guarded
Preconditions: Session is cleared or not authenticated
Steps: 1. Clear cookies and storage; 2. Navigate to /ecommerce/product-details?id=1
Expected_Result: User is redirected to login or remains on login page; unauthorized access is blocked

Title: @regression Product id=0 shows guard or empty state
Expected_Result: Page displays 'not found' error message or guarded behavior

Title: @regression Quantity cannot go below 1 via minus button
Preconditions: User is on product details page
Steps: 1. Locate minus button; 2. Click minus button multiple times; 3. Verify UI stability
Expected_Result: Quantity does not go below 1; page remains stable; minus button is still visible

Title: @regression Page renders correctly for a second product
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/product-details?id=2; 2. Wait for load; 3. Verify heading and price visible
Expected_Result: Product details page displays correctly for different product ID
